        // --- 4. DATA MANAGER ---
 
const DataMgr = {
    // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    // 💾 SAVE FUNCTION - حفظ البيانات
    // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    save: () => {
        try {
            const dataString = JSON.stringify(Store);
            localStorage.setItem('LifeOS_V7_Final', dataString);
            console.log('💾 Data saved successfully');
        } catch(e) {
            console.error('❌ Save Error:', e);
            UI.showToast("Save Error", "danger");
        }
    },
    
    // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    // 📂 LOAD FUNCTION - تحميل وإصلاح البيانات
    // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    load: () => { 
        const d = localStorage.getItem('LifeOS_V7_Final');
        
        if(d) {
            try {
                const parsed = JSON.parse(d);
                
                // 1. استرجاع اليوزر
                Store.user = parsed.user || Store.user;
                
                // 2. إصلاح الموسم (Season)
                Store.season = parsed.season || { 
                    startDate: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
                    active: true 
                };

                // 3. إصلاح القياسات (Stats)
                if (!parsed.stats || Object.keys(parsed.stats).length === 0) {
                    Store.stats = { STR: 0, DIS: 0, INT: 0, CHR: 0, EMT: 0, PCE: 0 };
                } else {
                    Store.stats = parsed.stats;
                }

                // 4. إصلاح المهارات (Skills)
                Store.skills = Array.isArray(parsed.skills) ? parsed.skills : [];

                // 5. استرجاع باقي القوائم
                Store.tasks = parsed.tasks || [];
                Store.raids = parsed.raids || [];
                Store.achievements = parsed.achievements || [];
                Store.shopCustom = parsed.shopCustom || [];
                Store.globalHistory = parsed.globalHistory || [];

                // 6. إصلاح العادات (Habits)
                let rawHabits = parsed.habits || [];
                if (!Array.isArray(rawHabits)) {
                    Store.habits = Object.entries(rawHabits).map(([key, val]) => {
                        val.id = key; return val;
                    });
                } else {
                    Store.habits = rawHabits;
                }

                // 🔥 7. إصلاح أقسام النوم (Sleep Sections)
                if (!Store.habitSections || Store.habitSections.length === 0) {
                    Store.habitSections = ['General']; 
                }
                // التأكد من أن كل عادة عندها قسم
                Store.habits.forEach(h => {
                    if (!h.section) h.section = 'General';
                });

                // 🔥 8. إصلاح أقسام المتجر (Shop Sections)
                if (!Store.shopSections || Store.shopSections.length === 0) {
                    Store.shopSections = ['General']; 
                }
                // التأكد من أن كل غرض عنده قسم
                if (Store.shopCustom) {
                    Store.shopCustom.forEach(item => {
                        if (!item.section) item.section = 'General';
                    });
                }

                // فحوصات أمان أخيرة
                if(!Store.user.lastLogin) Store.user.lastLogin = new Date().toDateString();
                
                console.log('✅ System Loaded & Repaired');
                
                // حفظ فوري لتثبيت التغييرات الجديدة
                DataMgr.save();

            } catch(e) { 
                console.error("❌ Corrupted Data:", e);
                UI.showToast("Data Recovered with defaults", "warning");
                Store.stats = { STR: 0, DIS: 0, INT: 0, CHR: 0, EMT: 0, PCE: 0 };
                Store.skills = [];
            }
        } else {
            console.log('ℹ️ New System Detected.');
            Store.stats = { STR: 0, DIS: 0, INT: 0, CHR: 0, EMT: 0, PCE: 0 };
            Store.skills = [];
            Store.season = { startDate: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] };
        }
    },
    
    // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    // 📤 EXPORT FUNCTION
    // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    exportData: () => {
        try {
            const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(Store, null, 2)], {type: "application/json"});
            const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
            const a = document.createElement('a');
            a.href = url; 
            a.download = `LifeOS_Backup_${new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)}.json`;
            a.click();
            UI.showToast("Backup created", "success");
        } catch(e) {
            console.error("Export error:", e);
            UI.showToast("Export failed", "danger");
        }
    },
    
    // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    // 📥 IMPORT FUNCTION (Fixed Logic)
    // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    importData: (input) => {
        const file = input.files[0];
        if(!file) return;
        const reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = (e) => {
            try { 
                const imported = JSON.parse(e.target.result);
                if(imported.user) {
                    // 🔥 التصحيح: استخدام Object.assign بدلاً من الاستبدال المباشر
                    Object.assign(Store, imported);
                    
                    DataMgr.save();
                    UI.showToast("Data restored successfully", "success");
                    setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1000);
                } else { throw new Error("Invalid structure"); }
            } 
            catch(err) { 
                console.error("Import error:", err);
                alert("⚠️ الملف غير صالح (Corrupted File)");
            }
        };
        reader.readAsText(file);
    }
};

    // --- 3. نظام التنقل (Navigation) ---
    nav: (pageId, btn) => {
        document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
        const target = document.getElementById(pageId);
        if (target) target.classList.add('active');

        document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(n => {
            n.classList.remove('active');
            n.style.color = '';
            n.style.textShadow = '';
        });

        if (btn) {
            btn.classList.add('active');
            if (pageId === 'view-ops-war') {
                btn.style.color = 'var(--danger)';
                btn.style.textShadow = '0 0 15px var(--danger)';
            }
        }
    },

    // --- 4. التحكم بالنوافذ (Modals Logic) ---
    closeModal: (id) => {
        document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('active');
    },

    openNew: (type) => {
        document.getElementById('modal-inject').classList.add('active');
        document.getElementById('inj-mode').value = type;
        document.getElementById('inj-edit-id').value = '';
        
        // تحديث القائمة المنسدلة للمهارات
        UI.updateSkillsDropdown();
        
        UI.switchInjectMode(type);
    },

    updateSkillsDropdown: () => {
        const dropdown = document.getElementById('inj-skill');
        if(!dropdown) return;
        
        dropdown.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- No Specific Skill --</option>';
        Store.skills.forEach(s => {
            const title = (typeof s === 'object') ? s.title : s;
            const icon = (typeof s === 'object') ? (s.icon || '⚡') : '⚡';
            dropdown.innerHTML += `<option value="${escapeHTML(title)}">${icon} ${escapeHTML(title)}</option>`;
        });
    },

    switchInjectMode: (mode) => {
        document.getElementById('inj-mode').value = mode;
        
        document.querySelectorAll('#field-type-select .btn-3d').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active-mode'));
        const btn = document.getElementById(`btn-mode-${mode}`);
        if(btn) btn.classList.add('active-mode');

        ['group-common', 'group-gamified', 'group-shop', 'group-patch', 'group-batch', 'group-import'].forEach(g => {
            document.getElementById(g).classList.add('hidden');
        });

        if(document.getElementById('field-days')) document.getElementById('field-days').classList.add('hidden');
        if(document.getElementById('field-date')) document.getElementById('field-date').classList.add('hidden');

        if (['TASK', 'HABIT', 'RAID'].includes(mode)) {
            document.getElementById('group-common').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('group-gamified').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('modal-title').innerText = `NEW ${mode}`;

            if (mode === 'HABIT') {
                if(document.getElementById('field-days')) document.getElementById('field-days').classList.remove('hidden');
            } else {
                if(document.getElementById('field-date')) document.getElementById('field-date').classList.remove('hidden');
            }

        } else if (mode === 'IMPORT') {
            document.getElementById('group-import').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('modal-title').innerText = "SYSTEM RESTORE";
        }
    },

    showToast: (msg, type) => {
        const box = document.getElementById('toast-container');
        if(!box) return;
        const el = document.createElement('div');
        const safeMsg = escapeHTML(msg);
        el.className = `toast ${type}`;
        el.innerHTML = type === 'success' ? `<i class="fas fa-check-circle" style="color:var(--accent)"></i> ${safeMsg}` :
                       type === 'danger' ? `<i class="fas fa-radiation" style="color:var(--danger)"></i> ${safeMsg}` :
                       `<i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> ${safeMsg}`;
        box.appendChild(el);
        setTimeout(() => {
            el.style.animation = 'fadeOut 0.5s forwards';
            setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 500);
        }, 3000);
    },
  
    // --- 5. MAIN RENDERERS (Core UI) ---
    renderAll: () => {
        UI.renderHud();
        UI.renderOps();

        UI.renderShop();

    // 3. OPS RENDERER (Robust Icons)
    renderOps: () => {
        const raidZone = document.getElementById('zone-raid-step');
        const taskZone = document.getElementById('zone-tasks');
        const emptyState = document.getElementById('ops-empty');
        
        if (!raidZone || !taskZone || !emptyState) return;

        // خريطة أيقونات الخصائص
        const STAT_ICONS = {
            'STR': '💪', 'INT': '🧠', 'DIS': '🧱',
            'CHR': '🗣️', 'EMT': '❤️', 'PCE': '🧘',
            'DEFAULT': '⚡'
        };

        const start = new Date(Store.season.startDate || new Date());
        const now = new Date();
        const diffTime = Math.floor((now - start) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
        const todayIdx = (diffTime % 7) + 1; 

        const dateStr = now.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
        const titleEl = document.querySelector('#view-ops .section-title');
        if(titleEl) titleEl.innerHTML = `<i class="fas fa-calendar-day"></i> OPERATIONS: DAY ${todayIdx} <span style="font-size:0.6rem; opacity:0.6; margin-left:10px;">${dateStr}</span>`;

        let raidsHTML = '';
        let tasksHTML = '';
        let archivedTasksHTML = ''; 
        let hasActive = false;

        // A. الغارات
        Store.raids.filter(r => r.status === 'ACTIVE' && !r.archived).forEach(r => {
            const step = r.steps.find(s => s.status === 'ACTIVE');
            if(step && step.delegated === true) return; 

            if(step) {
                hasActive = true;
                let raidIcon = '';
                if(r.linkedSkill) {
                    const skill = Store.skills.find(s => s.title === r.linkedSkill);
                    if(skill) raidIcon = skill.icon;
                }

                raidsHTML += `
                <div class="game-row" style="border-color:var(--danger); border-left-width:6px; align-items:center; background:rgba(255, 75, 75, 0.05);">
                    <div style="flex:1; cursor:pointer;" onclick="UI.openStepControl('${r.id}')">
                        <div style="display:flex; gap:5px; margin-bottom:4px; align-items:center;">
                            <span class="meta-tag tag-big">WARFRONT</span>
                            <span class="meta-tag tag-skill">${raidIcon} ${escapeHTML(r.linkedSkill) || 'RAID'}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="font-weight:800; font-size:1.1rem;">${escapeHTML(r.title)}</div>
                        <div style="margin-top:6px;">
                            <div style="font-size:0.9rem; color:var(--accent); font-weight:bold;">
                                <i class="fas fa-crosshairs"></i> <span style="margin-left:6px;">${escapeHTML(step.txt)}</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="margin-left:10px;">
                        <button class="btn-3d danger" onclick="Engine.advanceRaid('${r.id}')">ENGAGE</button>
                    </div>
                </div>`;
            }
        });

        // B. المهام
        Store.tasks.forEach(t => {
            if(t.status !== 'ACTIVE' && !t.archived) return;
            if (t.day && t.day !== todayIdx) return;

            let dayBadge = t.day === todayIdx 
                ? `<span style="font-size:0.6rem; background:var(--accent); color:#000; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:4px; margin-right:5px; font-weight:900;">TODAY</span>`
                : `<span style="font-size:0.6rem; border:1px solid #555; color:#777; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:4px; margin-right:5px;">POOL</span>`;
            
            let rowStyle = t.day === todayIdx ? `border-left-color:var(--accent);` : `border-left-color:var(--stat-int);`;

            // 🔥🔥🔥 المنطق المحدث والمضمون 🔥🔥🔥
            let finalIcon = '';
            
            // 1. محاولة جلب المهارة
            if (t.linkedSkill) {
                const skillData = Store.skills.find(s => s.title === t.linkedSkill);
                if(skillData) finalIcon = skillData.icon;
            }
            
            // 2. إذا فشل، نستخدم الستات (مع تنظيف النص لضمان التطابق)
            if (!finalIcon && t.stats && t.stats.length > 0) {
                const mainStat = t.stats[0].trim(); // تنظيف المسافات الزائدة
                finalIcon = STAT_ICONS[mainStat] || STAT_ICONS['DEFAULT'];
            }

            // 3. الحل الأخير: إذا بقي فارغاً ضع علامة
            if (!finalIcon) finalIcon = '⚡';

            let iconHTML = `<span style="font-size:1rem; margin-right:6px;">${finalIcon}</span>`;
            // 🔥🔥🔥 ------------------------ 🔥🔥🔥

            const statDisplay = (t.stats|| []).map(s => 
                `<span style="font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:900; margin-right:6px; letter-spacing:0.5px; color:var(--stat-${s.toLowerCase()})">${s}</span>`
            ).join('');
            
            let actionBtn = !t.archived ? 
                `<button class="btn-3d success" onclick="Engine.completeTask('${t.id}')"><i class="fas fa-check"></i></button>` :
                `<button class="btn-3d neutral" onclick="Engine.restoreStep('${t.id}')"><i class="fas fa-undo"></i></button>`;

            const html = `
            <div class="game-row" style="border-left-width:6px; ${rowStyle} ${t.archived ? 'filter:grayscale(100%); opacity:0.8; border-color:#444;' : ''}">
                <div style="flex:1; cursor:pointer;" onclick="UI.showDetails('${t.id}', 'TASK')">
                    <div style="margin-bottom:4px; display:flex; align-items:center;">
                        ${dayBadge} ${iconHTML} ${statDisplay}
                    </div>
                    <div style="font-weight:700; font-size:1rem; ${t.archived ? 'color:#aaa;' : ''}">${escapeHTML(t.title)}</div>
                </div>
                ${actionBtn}
            </div>`;

            if (t.archived) archivedTasksHTML += html;
            else { hasActive = true; tasksHTML += html; }
        });

        // 3. التجميع النهائي
        if (archivedTasksHTML) {
            tasksHTML += `
            <div style="margin-top:20px; border-top:1px dashed var(--border); padding-top:10px;">
                <button class="btn-3d neutral" style="width:100%; font-size:0.7rem;" onclick="document.getElementById('archive-tasks-box').classList.toggle('hidden')">
                    📂 ARCHIVE
                </button>
                <div id="archive-tasks-box" class="hidden" style="margin-top:10px;">${archivedTasksHTML}</div>
            </div>`;
        }

        raidZone.innerHTML = raidsHTML;
        taskZone.innerHTML = tasksHTML;

        if(!hasActive && !archivedTasksHTML && !raidsHTML) {
            emptyState.classList.remove('hidden');
            emptyState.innerHTML = `
                <div style="background:rgba(88, 204, 2, 0.1); width:80px; height:80px; border-radius:50%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; margin:0 auto 15px auto;">
                    <i class="fas fa-bed" style="font-size:2.5rem; color:var(--accent)"></i>
                </div>
                <div style="font-weight:800; font-size:1.2rem; margin-bottom:5px;">DAY ${todayIdx} CLEAR</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--text-muted);">No orders for today. Rest or check the Pool.</div>
            `;
        } else {
            emptyState.classList.add('hidden');
        }
    },
        // --- 9. HUB RENDERER (Archive Folders Edition V8.1) ---
    renderHub: () => {
        const zoneHabits = document.getElementById('zone-habits-active');
        const zoneLogs = document.getElementById('zone-history-list');
        const zoneRaids = document.getElementById('zone-raids-full');
        
        const now = new Date();
        const today = now.toDateString();
        const todayDayIdx = now.getDay(); 

        let activeHabitsHTML = '';
        let logsHTML = '';
        let raidsFullHTML = '';

        // التأكد من وجود الأقسام
        if (!Store.habitSections) Store.habitSections = ['General'];

        // 1. مصفوفات التجميع (Active/Sleep & Archive)
        let sleepGroups = {};
        let archiveGroups = {}; // 🔥 وعاء جديد للأرشيف
        
        // تهيئة المجلدات
        Store.habitSections.forEach(sec => {
            sleepGroups[sec] = [];
            archiveGroups[sec] = [];
        });

        if (!Store.habits) Store.habits = [];

        Store.habits.forEach(h => {
            const id = h.id;
            if (!h.history) h.history = {}; 
            
            // ضمان وجود قسم صالح
            if (!h.section || !Store.habitSections.includes(h.section)) h.section = 'General';

            // تجهيز الإحصائيات والأيقونات
            const statsList = h.stats || ['DIS'];
            const statDisplay = statsList.map(s => `<span style="font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:900; margin-right:6px; color:var(--stat-${s.toLowerCase()})">${s}</span>`).join('');
            
            let skillIcon = '';
            if (h.linkedSkill) {
                const skillData = Store.skills.find(s => s.title === h.linkedSkill);
                skillIcon = `<span style="font-size:1rem; margin-right:6px;">${skillData ? skillData.icon : '⚡'}</span>`;
            }

            // 🅰️ معالجة الأرشيف (بنظام المجلدات)
            if (h.archived) {
                const archiveCard = `
                <div class="game-row" style="background:rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border-left:4px solid #555; opacity:0.6; padding:8px; margin-bottom:5px;">
                    <div style="flex:1; cursor:pointer;" onclick="UI.showDetails('${id}', 'HABIT')">
                        <div style="margin-bottom:2px; font-size:0.7rem; color:#888;">${statDisplay} ARCHIVED</div>
                        <div style="font-weight:800; font-size:0.95rem; color:#aaa; text-decoration:line-through;">${escapeHTML(h.title)}</div>
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-3d neutral" style="padding:5px 10px; margin-right:5px;" onclick="Engine.toggleArchive('${id}', 'HABIT')">♻️</button>
                    <div onclick="Engine.moveHabit('${id}')" style="padding:5px; cursor:pointer; color:#555; font-size:1rem;">
                        <i class="fas fa-bars"></i>
                    </div>
                </div>`;
                
                if (!archiveGroups[h.section]) archiveGroups[h.section] = [];
                archiveGroups[h.section].push(archiveCard);
                return; // نتوقف هنا للعناصر المؤرشفة
            }

            // 🅱️ معالجة العناصر النشطة/النائمة
            let isActiveDay = false;
            // منطق الفحص (Pattern / Interval / Days)
            if (h.frequency === 'PATTERN' && h.pattern) {
                const start = new Date(h.createdAt);
                const d1 = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), now.getDate());
                const d2 = new Date(start.getFullYear(), start.getMonth(), start.getDate());
                const diffDays = Math.floor(Math.abs(d1 - d2) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
                if (h.pattern[diffDays % h.pattern.length] === '1') isActiveDay = true;
            } else if (h.frequency === 'INTERVAL' && h.interval) {
                const start = new Date(h.createdAt);
                const diffDays = Math.floor(Math.abs(now - start) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)); 
                if (diffDays % h.interval === 0) isActiveDay = true;
            } else if (h.activeDays && h.activeDays.length > 0) {
                if (h.activeDays.includes(todayDayIdx)) isActiveDay = true;
            } else {
                isActiveDay = true; 
            }

            const status = h.history[today];
            const phase = CONFIG.HABIT_PHASES[h.streak >= 21 ? 'CORE' : h.streak >= 14 ? 'EVOLVED' : h.streak >= 7 ? 'STABLE' : 'NEW'];

            // 1. العرض في القائمة النشطة (ACTIVE)
            if (isActiveDay) {
                const actionBtn = !status ? 
                    `<div style="display:flex; gap:5px;"><button class="btn-3d success" onclick="Engine.markHabit('${id}', 'DONE')"><i class="fas fa-check"></i></button><button class="btn-3d danger" onclick="Engine.markHabit('${id}', 'MISS')"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button></div>` : 
                    `<div style="font-weight:800; color:${status==='DONE'?'var(--accent)':'var(--danger)'}; border:1px solid currentColor; padding:4px 8px; border-radius:8px; font-size:0.7rem;">${status}</div>`;

                activeHabitsHTML += `
                <div class="game-row" style="border-left-width:6px; border-left-color:${phase.color}; opacity:${status?0.5:1};">
                    <div style="flex:1;" onclick="UI.showDetails('${id}', 'HABIT')">
                        <div style="margin-bottom:2px;">${skillIcon} ${statDisplay}</div>
                        <div style="font-weight:800; font-size:1.1rem;">${escapeHTML(h.title)}</div>
                        <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--text-muted);">Streak: ${h.streak}</div>
                    </div>
                    ${actionBtn} 
                </div>`;
            } 
            // 2. العرض في القائمة النائمة (SLEEPING)
            else {
                const sleepCard = `
                <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border:1px solid #333; padding:8px; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:5px;">
                    <div style="flex:1; cursor:pointer;" onclick="UI.showDetails('${id}', 'HABIT')">
                        <div style="display:flex; align-items:center;">
                            <span style="margin-right:8px; opacity:0.7;">${skillIcon || '💤'}</span>
                            <span style="font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:700; color:#aaa;">${escapeHTML(h.title)}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="font-size:0.65rem; color:#666; margin-left:25px;">${h.frequency || 'Daily'} Pattern</div>
                    </div>
                    <div onclick="Engine.moveHabit('${id}')" style="padding:10px; cursor:pointer; color:#555; font-size:1.2rem;">
                        <i class="fas fa-bars"></i>
                    </div>
                </div>`;
                
                if (!sleepGroups[h.section]) sleepGroups[h.section] = [];
                sleepGroups[h.section].push(sleepCard);
            }
            
            logsHTML += `<div style="padding:10px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:0.8rem;"><span>${escapeHTML(h.title)}</span><span style="font-weight:800; color:${status==='DONE'?'var(--accent)':status==='MISS'?'var(--danger)':'var(--text-muted)'}">${status || '-'}</span></div>`;
        });

        // --- تجميع HTML النهائي ---
        if(!activeHabitsHTML) activeHabitsHTML = '<div style="text-align:center; padding:20px; color:var(--text-muted); opacity:0.5;">No active habits today.</div>';

        // 🏗️ بناء قسم Sleeping Protocols (Folders)
                // 🏗️ بناء قسم Sleeping Protocols (Folders) مع التعديل
        let totalSleepHTML = '';
        Store.habitSections.forEach(sec => {
            const items = sleepGroups[sec] || [];
            
            // حتى لو فارغ، اعرض الفولدر حتى تكدر تعدل اسمه او تحذفه
            // الازرار تظهر فقط اذا مو General
            const controls = sec !== 'General' ? `
                <i class="fas fa-edit" onclick="event.preventDefault(); Engine.renameSection('HABIT', '${sec}')" style="margin-left:8px; color:#666; cursor:pointer;"></i>
                <i class="fas fa-trash" onclick="event.preventDefault(); Engine.deleteSection('${sec}')" style="margin-left:8px; color:var(--danger); cursor:pointer;"></i>
            ` : '';

            totalSleepHTML += `
            <details style="margin-bottom:10px; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border-radius:8px; border:1px solid #333; overflow:hidden;">
                <summary style="padding:12px; font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--text-main); font-weight:800; cursor:pointer; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05); display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;">
                    <div style="display:flex; align-items:center;">
                        <span>💤 ${escapeHTML(sec.toUpperCase())} <span style="opacity:0.5; font-size:0.7rem;">(${items.length})</span></span>
                        ${controls}
                    </div>
                    <i class="fas fa-chevron-down" style="font-size:0.7rem; opacity:0.5;"></i>
                </summary>
                <div style="padding:10px;">${items.length ? items.join('') : '<div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.7rem; color:#555; padding:5px;">No sleeping agents here.</div>'}</div>
            </details>`;
        });

        
        // زر إضافة مجلد
        const addFolderBtn = `
        <button class="btn-3d neutral" style="width:100%; border-style:dashed; opacity:0.7; margin-top:10px;" onclick="Engine.createHabitSection()">
            <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> NEW FOLDER
        </button>`;

        if (totalSleepHTML || addFolderBtn) {
            activeHabitsHTML += `
            <div style="margin-top:25px; border-top:1px dashed var(--border); padding-top:15px;">
                <div style="font-size:0.7rem; color:var(--text-muted); margin-bottom:10px; font-weight:800; text-align:center;">OFF DUTY PROTOCOLS</div>
                ${totalSleepHTML}
                ${addFolderBtn}
            </div>`;
        }

        // 🏗️ بناء قسم الأرشيف (Folders also)
        let totalArchiveHTML = '';
        Store.habitSections.forEach(sec => {
            const items = archiveGroups[sec] || [];
            if (items.length > 0) {
                totalArchiveHTML += `
                <details style="margin-bottom:10px; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.4); border-radius:8px; border:1px solid #444;">
                    <summary style="padding:10px; font-size:0.7rem; color:#888; font-weight:800; cursor:pointer; display:flex; justify-content:space-between;">
                        <span>📦 ${escapeHTML(sec.toUpperCase())} <span style="opacity:0.5;">(${items.length})</span></span>
                        <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i>
                    </summary>
                    <div style="padding:10px;">${items.join('')}</div>
                </details>`;
            }
        });

        if (totalArchiveHTML) {
            activeHabitsHTML += `
            <div style="margin-top:20px; border-top:1px dashed var(--border); padding-top:10px;">
                <button class="btn-3d neutral" style="width:100%; font-size:0.7rem; color:#666;" onclick="document.getElementById('archive-box').classList.toggle('hidden')">
                    📂 OPEN ARCHIVE
                </button>
                <div id="archive-box" class="hidden" style="margin-top:15px;">
                    ${totalArchiveHTML}
                </div>
            </div>`;
        }

        // ... (كود الـ Raids نفسه) ...
        if(Store.raids.length > 0) {
             Store.raids.forEach(r => {
                if(r.archived) return;
                const progress = r.steps.filter(s => s.status === 'DONE').length;
                const total = r.steps.length;
                const pct = Math.round((progress/total)*100);
                raidsFullHTML += `<div class="card" style="padding:15px; margin-bottom:10px;" onclick="UI.showDetails('${r.id}', 'RAID')"><div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between;"><div style="font-weight:800;">${escapeHTML(r.title)}</div><div style="color:var(--danger);">${pct}%</div></div></div>`;
             });
        }
        if(!raidsFullHTML) raidsFullHTML = '<div style="text-align:center; padding:20px; color:var(--text-muted)">No Active Raids</div>';

        zoneHabits.innerHTML = activeHabitsHTML;
        zoneLogs.innerHTML = logsHTML;
        zoneRaids.innerHTML = raidsFullHTML;
    },








    // --- 7. PROFILE RENDERER ---
    renderProfile: () => {
        const statZone = document.getElementById('zone-stats');
        const skillZone = document.getElementById('zone-skills-list');
        const trophyZone = document.getElementById('zone-trophies');
        const logZone = document.getElementById('zone-global-history');

        // A. Stats
        statZone.innerHTML = Object.keys(CONFIG.STATS).map(key => {
            const val = Store.stats[key] || 0;
            const pct = Math.min(100, (val/50)*100);
            const colorVar = `var(--stat-${key.toLowerCase()})`; 
            return `
            <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:800; margin-bottom:4px;">
                    <span style="color:${colorVar}">${CONFIG.STATS[key]}</span>
                    <span>${val.toFixed(1)}</span>
                </div>
                <div class="progress-container"><div class="progress-fill" style="width:${pct}%; background:${colorVar};"></div></div>
            </div>`;
        }).join('');

        // B. Skills
        skillZone.innerHTML = Store.skills.map(s => {
            if(typeof s === 'string') return `<div style="padding:10px; color:var(--text-muted);">Old Skill: ${escapeHTML(s)} (Please delete and recreate)</div>`;

            const pct = Math.min(100, (s.xp / s.maxXp) * 100);
            
            return `
            <div style="background:var(--bg-app); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:12px; padding:10px; margin-bottom:8px;">
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:6px;">
                    <div style="font-weight:800; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;">
                        <span style="font-size:1.2rem;">${s.icon}</span> 
                        <span>${escapeHTML(s.title)}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--inject); font-weight:900;">Lvl ${s.lvl}</div>
                </div>
                
                <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;">
                    <div class="progress-container" style="flex:1; height:6px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05); margin-top:0;">
                        <div class="progress-fill" style="width:${pct}%; background:var(--inject);"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="font-size:0.6rem; color:var(--text-muted); width:40px; text-align:right;">${Math.floor(s.xp)}/${s.maxXp}</div>
                </div>

                <div style="text-align:right; margin-top:4px;">
                        <button class="btn-3d danger" style="padding:2px 6px; font-size:0.6rem; display:inline-block;" onclick="Engine.removeSkill('${s.title}')">Delete</button>
                </div>
            </div>`;
        }).join('') || '<div style="padding:15px; text-align:center; color:var(--text-muted); font-size:0.8rem;">No Skills Learned Yet</div>';

        // C. Trophies
        const allTrophies = [...CONFIG.TROPHY_DB, ...(Store.customTrophies || [])];
        trophyZone.innerHTML = allTrophies.map(trophy => {
            let currentVal = 0;
            if(trophy.type === 'GOLD') currentVal = Store.user.gold;
            else if(trophy.type === 'STREAK') currentVal = Store.user.streak;
            else if(trophy.type === 'LEVEL') currentVal = Store.user.lvl;
            else if(Store.stats[trophy.type]) currentVal = Store.stats[trophy.type];

            let tierIdx = -1;
            if(trophy.tiers) {
                trophy.tiers.forEach((t, i) => { if(currentVal >= t.val) tierIdx = i; });
            }

            const isUnlocked = tierIdx >= 0;
            const stars = isUnlocked ? '★'.repeat(tierIdx + 1) : '';

            return `
            <div class="trophy-item ${isUnlocked?'unlocked':'locked'}" 
                    style="${isUnlocked ? 'border-color:var(--warning); background:rgba(0,0,0,0.4);' : ''}"
                    onclick="UI.showTrophyDetails('${trophy.id}')">
                <div style="font-size:1.5rem; margin-bottom:5px;">${trophy.icon}</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.55rem; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.5px; color:${isUnlocked?'#fff':'var(--text-muted)'}">${escapeHTML(trophy.title)}</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.6rem; color:var(--warning); height:10px; margin-top:2px;">${stars}</div>
            </div>`;
        }).join('');

        // D. Logs
        logZone.innerHTML = Store.globalHistory.map(l => `
            <div style="border-left:2px solid ${l.tone==='SUCCESS'?'var(--accent)':'var(--text-muted)'}; padding-left:8px; margin-bottom:6px;">
                <span style="color:var(--text-muted)">[${l.time}]</span> ${escapeHTML(l.msg)}
            </div>
        `).join('');
    },

        renderShop: () => {
        const sysZone = document.getElementById('shop-system');
        const custZone = document.getElementById('shop-list');

        if (!sysZone || !custZone) return;

        sysZone.innerHTML = '';
        custZone.innerHTML = '';

        // 1. أدوات النظام
        const sysItems = [
            { id:'s1', title:'Skip Day', cost:500, icon:'fa-forward', desc:'Freeze your Streak for 24h.' },
            { id:'s2', title:'Repair Kit', cost:1000, icon:'fa-tools', desc:'Restore a broken Habit Core instantly.' }
        ];

        const createCard = (item, type) => {
            const el = document.createElement('div');
            el.className = 'habit-card'; 
            
            const iconClass = item.icon ? item.icon : 'fa-gift';
            const iconColor = type === 'SYSTEM' ? 'var(--stat-int)' : 'var(--warning)';
            const borderColor = type === 'SYSTEM' ? 'var(--stat-int)' : 'var(--warning)';

            // زر النقل
            const moveBtn = type === 'CUSTOM' ? 
                `<div onclick="event.stopPropagation(); Engine.moveShopItem('${item.id}')" style="padding:10px; cursor:pointer; color:#555; font-size:1.2rem; margin-left:auto;">
                    <i class="fas fa-bars"></i>
                 </div>` : 
                `<div style="font-size:1.2rem; color:var(--text-muted); opacity:0.5; margin-left:auto;"><i class="fas fa-chevron-right"></i></div>`;

            el.innerHTML = `
                <div class="h-icon" style="color:${iconColor}; border:1px solid ${borderColor}; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);" onclick="UI.showShopDetails('${item.id}', '${type}')">
                    <i class="fas ${iconClass}"></i>
                </div>
                <div class="h-info" onclick="UI.showShopDetails('${item.id}', '${type}')" style="flex:1; cursor:pointer;">
                    <h3>${escapeHTML(item.title)}</h3>
                    <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:${iconColor}; margin-top:4px; font-weight:800;">
                        <i class="fas fa-coins"></i> ${item.cost}
                    </div>
                </div>
                ${moveBtn}
            `;
            return el;
        };

        sysItems.forEach(item => sysZone.appendChild(createCard(item, 'SYSTEM')));

        // 2. الأغراض الخاصة (مع الفولدرات)
        const safeSections = (Store.shopSections && Array.isArray(Store.shopSections) && Store.shopSections.length > 0) 
                             ? Store.shopSections 
                             : ['General'];

        const safeItems = Store.shopCustom || [];
        let groups = {};
        safeSections.forEach(sec => groups[sec] = []);

        safeItems.forEach(item => {
            let sec = item.section;
            if (!sec || !safeSections.includes(sec)) sec = 'General';
            if (!groups[sec]) groups[sec] = [];
            groups[sec].push(createCard(item, 'CUSTOM'));
        });

        // بناء الـ HTML
        safeSections.forEach(sec => {
            const itemsElements = groups[sec] || [];
            
            const folder = document.createElement('details');
            folder.style.marginBottom = '10px';
            folder.style.background = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)';
            folder.style.borderRadius = '8px';
            folder.style.border = '1px solid #333';
            folder.open = true; 

            const summary = document.createElement('summary');
            summary.style.padding = '12px';
            summary.style.fontSize = '0.75rem';
            summary.style.color = 'var(--warning)';
            summary.style.fontWeight = '800';
            summary.style.cursor = 'pointer';
            summary.style.background = 'rgba(255, 200, 0, 0.05)';
            summary.style.display = 'flex';
            summary.style.justifyContent = 'space-between';
            summary.style.alignItems = 'center';

            // هنا أضفنا زر التعديل (القلم) وزر الحذف
            summary.innerHTML = `
                <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;">
                    <span>🛍️ ${escapeHTML(sec.toUpperCase())} <span style="opacity:0.5;">(${itemsElements.length})</span></span>
                    ${sec !== 'General' ? `
                    <i class="fas fa-edit" onclick="event.preventDefault(); Engine.renameSection('SHOP', '${sec}')" style="color:#666; cursor:pointer;"></i>
                    <i class="fas fa-trash" onclick="event.preventDefault(); Engine.deleteShopSection('${sec}')" style="color:var(--danger); cursor:pointer;"></i>
                    ` : ''}
                </div>
                <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i>`;
            
            const content = document.createElement('div');
            content.style.padding = '10px';

            if (itemsElements.length > 0) {
                itemsElements.forEach(el => content.appendChild(el));
            } else {
                content.innerHTML = '<div style="font-size:0.7rem; color:#666; text-align:center; padding:10px;">Empty Aisle</div>';
            }

            folder.appendChild(summary);
            folder.appendChild(content);
            custZone.appendChild(folder);
        });

        // زر إضافة قسم جديد
        const addSecBtn = document.createElement('button');
        addSecBtn.className = 'btn-3d neutral';
        addSecBtn.style.width = '100%';
        addSecBtn.style.marginTop = '15px';
        addSecBtn.style.borderStyle = 'dashed';
        addSecBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-plus"></i> NEW AISLE';
        addSecBtn.onclick = () => Engine.createShopSection();
        
        custZone.appendChild(addSecBtn);
    },

//hoopshop


    // --- 9. UTILITIES (Tabs & Step Controls) ---
    switchHubTab: (tab) => {
        ['habits', 'logs', 'raids'].forEach(t => {
            const btn = document.getElementById(`tab-${t}`);
            const view = document.getElementById(`view-${t}`);
            
            if(t === tab) {
                btn.style.background = 'var(--bg-app)';
                btn.style.color = 'var(--text-main)';
                view.classList.remove('hidden');
            } else {
                btn.style.background = 'transparent';
                btn.style.color = 'var(--text-muted)';
                view.classList.add('hidden');
            }
        });
    },

    openStepControl: (raidId) => {
        const r = Store.raids.find(x => x.id == raidId);
        if(!r) return;
        
        const step = r.steps.find(s => s.status === 'ACTIVE');
        if(!step) return UI.showToast("No Active Step", "danger");

        document.getElementById('step-raid-id').value = r.id;
        document.getElementById('step-id').value = step.id;

        document.getElementById('view-step-txt').innerText = step.txt;
        document.getElementById('view-step-desc').innerText = step.desc || "No intel available.";
        document.getElementById('view-step-diff').innerText = r.size || "NORMAL";
        document.getElementById('view-step-skill').innerText = r.linkedSkill || "None";

        document.getElementById('step-txt').value = step.txt;
        document.getElementById('step-desc').value = step.desc || "";

        UI.toggleStepEdit(false); 
        document.getElementById('modal-step-control').classList.add('active');
    },

    toggleStepEdit: (isEdit) => {
        if(isEdit) {
            document.getElementById('step-view-mode').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('step-edit-mode').classList.remove('hidden');
        } else {
            document.getElementById('step-view-mode').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('step-edit-mode').classList.add('hidden');
        }
    },

    // --- 10. DETAILS MODAL ---
        // --- 10. DETAILS MODAL (Updated & Safe) ---
    showDetails: (id, type) => {
        // 1. البحث عن العنصر (نفس المنطق القديم)
        let item;
        if(type === 'TASK') item = Store.tasks.find(i => i.id == id);
        else if(type === 'HABIT') item = Store.habits.find(i => i.id == id);
        else if(type === 'RAID') item = Store.raids.find(i => i.id == id);

        if(!item) return;

        // 2. تعبئة البيانات الأساسية (استخدام innerText للأمان)
        document.getElementById('dt-title').innerText = item.title;
        document.getElementById('dt-type').innerText = item.size || 'NORMAL';
        document.getElementById('dt-type').style.color = 
            item.size === 'BIG' ? 'var(--danger)' : item.size === 'SMALL' ? 'var(--accent)' : '#fff';
        
        document.getElementById('dt-desc').innerText = item.desc || "No additional details.";
        
        const stats = item.stats || [item.stat] || ['-'];
        document.getElementById('dt-stats').innerText = stats.join(' / ');

        if(item.linkedSkill) {
            document.getElementById('dt-skill-box').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('dt-skill').innerText = item.linkedSkill;
        } else {
            document.getElementById('dt-skill-box').classList.add('hidden');
        }

        const sizeData = CONFIG.HABIT_SIZES[item.size || 'NORMAL'];
        document.getElementById('dt-xp').innerText = `+${sizeData.xp}`;
        document.getElementById('dt-gold').innerText = `+${sizeData.gold}`;
        
        // أولاً: تنظيف أي جدول قديم (عشان ما يطلع للمهام العادية)
        const oldSchedule = document.getElementById('dt-schedule-box');
        if(oldSchedule) oldSchedule.remove();

        // ثانياً: إنشاء الجدول فقط إذا كان النوع HABIT
                if (type === 'HABIT') {
            const daysMap = ['Sun', 'Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat'];
            let scheduleTxt = "Daily (Every Day)";

            // 🔥 عرض النمط بشكل ذكي
            if (item.frequency === 'PATTERN') {
                // يحول 1110 إلى ON / ON / ON / OFF
                scheduleTxt = "Cycle: " + item.pattern.split('').map(x => x === '1' ? 'ON' : 'OFF').join(' - ');
            } 
            else if (item.frequency === 'INTERVAL') {
                scheduleTxt = `Every ${item.interval} Days`;
            } else if (item.activeDays && item.activeDays.length > 0 && item.activeDays.length < 7) {
                scheduleTxt = item.activeDays.map(d => daysMap[d]).join(' / ');
            }

            // ... (باقي الكود نفسه لانشاء الـ div) ...
            const scheduleDiv = document.createElement('div');
            scheduleDiv.id = 'dt-schedule-box';
            // ... (نفس الستايل السابق) ...
            scheduleDiv.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';
            scheduleDiv.style.padding = '10px';
            scheduleDiv.style.borderRadius = '8px';
            scheduleDiv.style.marginBottom = '15px';
            scheduleDiv.style.border = '1px solid var(--border)';
            scheduleDiv.style.display = 'flex';
            scheduleDiv.style.alignItems = 'center';
            scheduleDiv.style.gap = '10px';

            scheduleDiv.innerHTML = `
                <div style="font-size:1.2rem; color:var(--text-muted);"><i class="fas fa-calendar-alt"></i></div>
                <div>
                    <div style="font-size:0.65rem; color:var(--text-muted); font-weight:800;">ACTIVE SCHEDULE</div>
                    <div style="font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:bold; color:#fff;">${scheduleTxt}</div>
                </div>
            `;
            
            const descBox = document.getElementById('dt-desc-box');
            if(descBox) descBox.parentNode.insertBefore(scheduleDiv, descBox.nextSibling);
        }

        // 🔥🔥🔥 نهاية التحديث 🔥🔥🔥

        // 3. أزرار التحكم (Actions) - نفس الكود القديم بالضبط
        const modalContent = document.querySelector('#modal-details .modal-content');
        const oldActions = document.getElementById('dt-actions');
        if(oldActions) oldActions.remove();

        const archiveIcon = item.archived ? 'fa-box-open' : 'fa-archive';
        const archiveText = item.archived ? 'RESTORE' : 'ARCHIVE';

        let archiveFunc = `Engine.toggleArchive('${id}', '${type}')`;
        if (type === 'TASK' && item.archived && item.origin) {
            archiveFunc = `Engine.restoreStep('${id}')`;
        }

        const actionDiv = document.createElement('div');
        actionDiv.id = 'dt-actions';
        actionDiv.style.display = 'flex';
        actionDiv.style.gap = '10px';
        actionDiv.style.marginTop = '20px';
        
        actionDiv.innerHTML = `
            <button class="btn-3d neutral" style="flex:1;" onclick="Engine.openEditModal('${id}', '${type}')">
                <i class="fas fa-edit"></i> EDIT
            </button>
            <button class="btn-3d neutral" style="flex:1;" onclick="${archiveFunc}">
                <i class="fas ${archiveIcon}"></i> ${archiveText}
            </button>
            <button class="btn-3d danger" style="flex:1;" onclick="${type === 'RAID' ? `Engine.deleteRaid('${id}')` : type === 'HABIT' ? `Engine.deleteHabit('${id}')` : `Engine.deleteTask('${id}')`}">
                <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
            </button>
        `;
        
        modalContent.appendChild(actionDiv);
        document.getElementById('modal-details').classList.add('active');
    },


    // --- 11. SHOP DETAILS MODAL ---
    showShopDetails: (id, type) => {
        let item;
        if(type === 'SYSTEM') {
            const sysItems = [
                { id:'s1', title:'Skip Day', cost:500, desc:'Freezes your Streak for 24h.' },
                { id:'s2', title:'Repair Kit', cost:1000, desc:'Restores a broken Habit Core instantly.' }
            ];
            item = sysItems.find(i => i.id === id);
        } else {
            item = Store.shopCustom.find(i => i.id === id);
        }

        if(!item) return;

        document.getElementById('sh-dt-title').innerText = item.title;
        document.getElementById('sh-dt-desc').innerText = item.desc || "No description provided.";
        document.getElementById('sh-dt-cost').innerHTML = `<i class="fas fa-coins"></i> ${item.cost}`;

        const actionBox = document.getElementById('sh-actions');
        if(!actionBox) return;
        
        actionBox.innerHTML = '';

        const buyBtn = document.createElement('button');
        buyBtn.className = 'btn-3d';
        buyBtn.style.flex = '2'; 
        
        if(Store.user.gold < item.cost) {
            buyBtn.style.background = "var(--bg-panel)";
            buyBtn.style.color = "var(--text-muted)";
            buyBtn.innerHTML = "POOR (No Gold)";
            buyBtn.disabled = true;
        } else {
            buyBtn.style.background = "var(--warning)";
            buyBtn.style.color = "#000";
            buyBtn.innerHTML = "BUY";
            buyBtn.onclick = () => {
                Engine.buyItem(item.id, item.cost, item.title);
                UI.closeModal('modal-shop-details');
            };
        }
        actionBox.appendChild(buyBtn);

        if (type !== 'SYSTEM') {
            const editBtn = document.createElement('button');
            editBtn.className = 'btn-3d neutral';
            editBtn.style.flex = '1';
            editBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-edit"></i>';
            editBtn.onclick = () => {
                UI.closeModal('modal-shop-details');
                UI.openEditShopItem(item);
            };
            actionBox.appendChild(editBtn);

            const delBtn = document.createElement('button');
            delBtn.className = 'btn-3d danger';
            delBtn.style.flex = '1';
            delBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-trash"></i>';
            delBtn.onclick = () => {
                if(confirm("Delete this Reward permanently?")) {
                    Store.shopCustom = Store.shopCustom.filter(x => x.id !== id);
                    DataMgr.save();
                    UI.renderShop();
                    UI.closeModal('modal-shop-details');
                    UI.showToast("Item Deleted 🗑️", "neutral");
                }
            };
            actionBox.appendChild(delBtn);
        }

        document.getElementById('modal-shop-details').classList.add('active');
    },

    openEditShopItem: (item) => {
        document.getElementById('new-shop-title').value = item.title;
        document.getElementById('new-shop-cost').value = item.cost;
        
        const descInput = document.getElementById('new-shop-desc');
        if(descInput) descInput.value = item.desc || "";
        
        Store.shopCustom = Store.shopCustom.filter(x => x.id !== item.id);
        
        document.getElementById('modal-add-shop').classList.add('active');
        UI.showToast("Editing Mode: Make changes & Save ✏️", "gold");
    },

    // --- 12. TROPHY SYSTEM LOGIC ---
    showTrophyDetails: (tId) => {
        const allTrophies = [...CONFIG.TROPHY_DB, ...(Store.customTrophies || [])];
        UI.tempTrophy = allTrophies.find(x => x.id === tId);
        if(!UI.tempTrophy) return;

        let currentVal = 0;
        const t = UI.tempTrophy;
        if(t.type === 'GOLD') currentVal = Store.user.gold;
        else if(t.type === 'STREAK') currentVal = Store.user.streak;
        else if(t.type === 'LEVEL') currentVal = Store.user.lvl;
        else if(Store.stats[t.type]) currentVal = Store.stats[t.type];

        let actualIdx = -1;
        if(t.tiers) {
            t.tiers.forEach((tier, i) => { if(currentVal >= tier.val) actualIdx = i; });
        }
        
        UI.tempTierIdx = actualIdx === -1 ? 0 : actualIdx;
        UI.renderTrophyView(currentVal, actualIdx);
        document.getElementById('modal-trophy').classList.add('active');
    },

    navTrophy: (dir) => {
        if(!UI.tempTrophy || !UI.tempTrophy.tiers) return;
        
        const max = UI.tempTrophy.tiers.length - 1;
        let newIdx = UI.tempTierIdx + dir;
        
        if(newIdx < 0) newIdx = 0;
        if(newIdx > max) newIdx = max;
        
        UI.tempTierIdx = newIdx;
        
        const t = UI.tempTrophy;
        let currentVal = 0;
        if(t.type === 'GOLD') currentVal = Store.user.gold;
        else if(t.type === 'STREAK') currentVal = Store.user.streak;
        else if(t.type === 'LEVEL') currentVal = Store.user.lvl;
        else if(Store.stats[t.type]) currentVal = Store.stats[t.type];
        
        let actualIdx = -1;
        t.tiers.forEach((tier, i) => { if(currentVal >= tier.val) actualIdx = i; });

        UI.renderTrophyView(currentVal, actualIdx);
    },

    renderTrophyView: (currentVal, actualIdx) => {
        const t = UI.tempTrophy;
        const viewIdx = UI.tempTierIdx; 
        const tierData = t.tiers[viewIdx];

        document.getElementById('tr-icon').innerText = t.icon;
        document.getElementById('tr-title').innerText = t.title;
        document.getElementById('tr-rank').innerText = `RANK ${viewIdx+1}: ${tierData.rank}`;

        const isUnlocked = viewIdx <= actualIdx;

        if(isUnlocked) {
            document.getElementById('tr-quote').innerText = `"${tierData.quote}"`;
            document.getElementById('tr-quote').style.color = "#ddd";
            document.getElementById('tr-date-box').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('tr-date').innerText = "UNLOCKED ✅"; 
            
            if (viewIdx < actualIdx) {
                document.getElementById('tr-next').innerText = "COMPLETED";
                document.getElementById('tr-bar').style.width = "100%";
            } else {
                const nextTier = t.tiers[viewIdx + 1];
                if(nextTier) {
                    document.getElementById('tr-next').innerText = `${currentVal} / ${nextTier.val} ${t.type}`;
                    const prevVal = tierData.val;
                    const pct = Math.min(100, Math.max(0, ((currentVal - prevVal) / (nextTier.val - prevVal)) * 100));
                    const simplePct = Math.min(100, (currentVal / nextTier.val) * 100);
                    
                    document.getElementById('tr-bar').style.width = `${viewIdx===0 ? simplePct : pct}%`;
                } else {
                    document.getElementById('tr-next').innerText = "MAX RANK REACHED";
                    document.getElementById('tr-bar').style.width = "100%";
                }
            }
        } else {
            document.getElementById('tr-quote').innerText = "🔒 Classified Information. Reach this rank to decode.";
            document.getElementById('tr-quote').style.color = "var(--text-muted)";
            document.getElementById('tr-date-box').classList.add('hidden');
            
            document.getElementById('tr-next').innerText = `REQUIREMENT: ${tierData.val} ${t.type}`;
            document.getElementById('tr-bar').style.width = "0%";
        }
    },

    // --- 13. STREAK SYSTEM (The Matrix Circle) ---
    openStreak: () => {
        const targets = { 'EASY': 300, 'NORMAL': 400, 'HARD': 500 };
        let mode = Store.user.streakMode || 'NORMAL';
        let target = targets[mode];
        let current = Store.user.dailyXp || 0;
        let pctVal = Math.min((current / target) * 100, 100);
        let matrixGreen = '#00ff41'; 
        
        let html = `
            <div style="font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; color: ${matrixGreen}; text-shadow: 0 0 5px ${matrixGreen}; user-select: none;">
                <h2 style="margin:0 0 20px 0; font-size: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: 2px; border-bottom: 1px dashed ${matrixGreen}; padding-bottom: 10px;">
                    SYSTEM SYNC
                </h2>
                <div style="width: 160px; height: 160px; margin: 0 auto 25px auto; border-radius: 50%; background: conic-gradient(${matrixGreen} ${pctVal}%, #111 0); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(0, 255, 65, 0.2); border: 1px solid #1a3320;">
                    <div style="width: 140px; height: 140px; background: #000; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 2;">
                        <span style="font-size: 2.2rem; font-weight: bold;">${current}</span>
                        <div style="width: 40%; height: 2px; background: ${matrixGreen}; margin: 5px 0; opacity: 0.5; box-shadow: 0 0 5px ${matrixGreen};"></div>
                        <span style="font-size: 1rem; opacity: 0.8; color: #fff;">/ ${target} XP</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div style="border: 1px solid ${matrixGreen}; padding: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px; background: rgba(0, 255, 65, 0.03); font-size: 0.9rem;">
                    <div>STATUS: <span style="font-weight:bold; color:#fff;">${pctVal >= 100 ? 'COMPLETE' : 'PENDING'}</span></div>
                    <div style="margin-top:5px;">PROTOCOL: [ ${mode} ]</div>
                </div>
                <div style="display:flex; gap:10px; justify-content:center;">
                    <button onclick="UI.setStreakMode('EASY')" style="flex:1; padding:10px; border:1px solid ${matrixGreen}; background:#000; color:${matrixGreen}; cursor:pointer; font-family:inherit; font-weight:bold; transition:0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.background='${matrixGreen}'; this.style.color='#000'" onmouseout="this.style.background='#000'; this.style.color='${matrixGreen}'">EASY</button>
                    <button onclick="UI.setStreakMode('NORMAL')" style="flex:1; padding:10px; border:1px solid ${matrixGreen}; background:#000; color:${matrixGreen}; cursor:pointer; font-family:inherit; font-weight:bold; transition:0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.background='${matrixGreen}'; this.style.color='#000'" onmouseout="this.style.background='#000'; this.style.color='${matrixGreen}'">NORMAL</button>
                    <button onclick="UI.setStreakMode('HARD')" style="flex:1; padding:10px; border:1px solid ${matrixGreen}; background:#000; color:${matrixGreen}; cursor:pointer; font-family:inherit; font-weight:bold; transition:0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.background='${matrixGreen}'; this.style.color='#000'" onmouseout="this.style.background='#000'; this.style.color='${matrixGreen}'">HARD</button>
                </div>
            </div>`;

        Swal.fire({
            html: html,
            background: '#050505',
            showConfirmButton: false,
            showCloseButton: true,
            backdrop: `rgba(0,0,0,0.9)`,
            width: 400,
            padding: '20px',
            willOpen: () => {
                const popup = Swal.getPopup();
                popup.style.border = `2px solid ${matrixGreen}`;
                popup.style.boxShadow = `0 0 30px ${matrixGreen}`;
                popup.style.borderRadius = '0px'; 
            }
        });
    },

    setStreakMode: (newMode) => {
        Store.user.streakMode = newMode;
        DataMgr.save(); 
        Swal.close();   
        setTimeout(() => UI.openStreak(), 200); 
    },

            <div id="war-scroll-container" style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
                
                <div style="margin-bottom: 15px; display:inline-block; border:1px solid #444; padding:8px 20px; border-radius:30px; background:rgba(20,20,20,0.8);">
                    <label style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:bold; margin-right:5px; letter-spacing:1px;">ZERO HOUR</label>
                    <input type="date" value="${storedDate}" onchange="Engine.setCampaignStart(this.value)" 
                           style="background:transparent; border:none; color:var(--warning); font-family:inherit; font-weight:bold; outline:none; font-size:1rem; text-align:center;">
                </div>

                <div style="margin-top:10px;">
                    <i class="fas fa-biohazard" style="font-size:3rem; color:var(--danger); animation: pulse 2s infinite;"></i>
                    <h1 style="font-size:1.4rem; color:#fff; font-weight:900; margin-top:10px;">WAR ROOM</h1>
                    <div style="font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--text-muted);">ACTIVE FRONT: WEEK ${currentWeek}</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="weeks-grid" style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:15px; background:transparent; border:none;">`;

        targetWeeks.forEach(w => {
            let statusText, statusColor, opacity, icon, mainTitle;
            let completionRate = "0%";
            
            // حساب النسبة
            if (w < currentWeek && Engine.db && Engine.db.war && Engine.db.war[w]) {
                let totalTasks = 0, doneTasks = 0;
                Object.values(Engine.db.war[w]).forEach(dayTasks => {
                    if(Array.isArray(dayTasks)){
                        dayTasks.forEach(t => { totalTasks++; if(t.done) doneTasks++; });
                    }
                });
                let percent = totalTasks === 0 ? 0 : Math.round((doneTasks / totalTasks) * 100);
                completionRate = `${percent}%`;
            }

            // منطق الألوان والحالات
            if (w < currentWeek - 1) {
                mainTitle = `WEEK ${w}`;
                statusText = `COMPLETION: <span style="color:#fff;">${completionRate}</span>`;
                statusColor = "#333"; opacity = 0.5; icon = "fa-chart-pie"; 
            } else if (w >= currentWeek - 1 && w <= currentWeek + 1) {
                mainTitle = `WEEK ${w}`;
                if (w === currentWeek) {
                    statusText = "CURRENT ENGAGEMENT"; statusColor = "var(--danger)"; opacity = 1; icon = "fa-crosshairs";
                } else if (w === currentWeek - 1) {
                    statusText = "LAST SECTOR REVIEW"; statusColor = "#666"; opacity = 0.8; icon = "fa-history";
                } else { 
                    statusText = "IMMINENT THREAT"; statusColor = "var(--warning)"; opacity = 0.8; icon = "fa-exclamation-triangle";
                }
            } else {
                mainTitle = `WEEK ${w}`;
                statusText = "LOCKED"; statusColor = "#222"; opacity = 0.3; icon = "fa-lock";
            }

            let openDay = (w === currentWeek) ? ((diffDays % 7) || 1) : 1;

            html += `
            <div class="card" onclick="UI.openWarDay(${w}, ${openDay})" 
                 style="cursor:pointer; border-left: 5px solid ${statusColor}; opacity: ${opacity}; margin-bottom:0; padding: 25px 20px; transition:0.2s; position:relative; overflow:hidden;">
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;">
                    <div>
                        <div style="font-size:1.6rem; font-weight:900; color:#fff;">${mainTitle}</div>
                        <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:800; color:${w < currentWeek - 1 ? '#888' : statusColor}; letter-spacing:1px; margin-top:5px;">
                            ${statusText}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="font-size:1.8rem; color:${statusColor};">
                        <i class="fas ${icon}"></i>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>`;
        });

        // مسافة أمان للسكرول
        html += `<div style="height: 150px; width: 100%;"></div></div></div>`;
        zone.innerHTML = html;
    },


    openWarDay: (w, d) => {
        UI.currentWarView = { w, d };
        UI.renderWarDayContent();
        const modal = document.getElementById('modal-war-day');
        if(modal) modal.classList.add('active');
    },

    navWarDay: (direction) => {
        if(!UI.currentWarView) UI.currentWarView = { w:1, d:1 };
        let { w, d } = UI.currentWarView;
        
        d += direction;
        if (d > 7) { d = 1; w++; } 
        else if (d < 1) { d = 7; w--; }

        if (w < 1) w = 1; 
        if (w > 12) w = 12;

        UI.currentWarView = { w, d };
        UI.renderWarDayContent();
    },

    // رسم محتوى اليوم التكتيكي (تم التصحيح)
    renderWarDayContent: () => {
        const { w, d } = UI.currentWarView;
        
        const titleEl = document.getElementById('war-day-title');
        if(titleEl) titleEl.innerHTML = `D${d} <span style="color:var(--text-muted)">|</span> W${w}`;

        const contentBox = document.getElementById('war-day-content');
        if(!contentBox) return;
        contentBox.innerHTML = '';

        let foundContent = false;

        // A. الغارات (Raids)
        Store.raids.forEach(r => {
            if (r.steps && r.status === 'ACTIVE') {
                r.steps.forEach(step => {
                    if (step.assignedDate && step.assignedDate.w === w && step.assignedDate.d === d) {
                        foundContent = true;
                        const isDone = step.status === 'DONE';
                        contentBox.innerHTML += `
                        <div class="game-row" style="border-left-color:var(--danger); padding:10px; margin-bottom:8px; opacity:${isDone?0.5:1}">
                            <div style="flex:1">
                                <div style="font-size:0.6rem; color:var(--danger); font-weight:800;">RAID: ${escapeHTML(r.title)}</div>
                                <div style="font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:bold; ${isDone?'text-decoration:line-through':''}">${escapeHTML(step.txt)}</div>
                            </div>
                            ${!isDone ? `<button class="btn-3d danger" style="padding:4px 8px;" onclick="Engine.advanceRaid('${r.id}')">KILL</button>` : '<i class="fas fa-check" style="color:#555"></i>'}
                        </div>`;
                    }
                });
            }
        });

        // B. المهام (Tasks)
        Store.tasks.forEach(t => {
            if (t.assignedDate && t.assignedDate.w === w && t.assignedDate.d === d && t.status !== 'DONE') {
                foundContent = true;
                contentBox.innerHTML += `
                <div class="game-row" style="border-left-color:var(--stat-int); padding:10px; margin-bottom:8px;">
                     <div style="flex:1">
                        <div style="font-size:0.6rem; color:var(--stat-int); font-weight:800;">MISSION</div>
                        <div style="font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:bold;">${escapeHTML(t.title)}</div>
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn-3d success" style="padding:4px 8px;" onclick="Engine.completeTask('${t.id}')">DONE</button>
                </div>`;
            }
        });

        // رسالة عدم وجود مهام
        if (!foundContent) {
            contentBox.innerHTML = `
                <div style="text-align:center; padding:40px; color:var(--text-muted); opacity:0.5;">
                    <i class="fas fa-coffee" style="font-size:2rem; margin-bottom:10px;"></i><br>
                    NO OPERATIONS FOR D${d}W${w}
                </div>`;
        }
    },

    // --- 15. تفاصيل الأسبوع والربط اليدوي ---
    openWeekDetails: (weekNum) => {
        if(!Store.season.weeks[weekNum - 1]) {
            Store.season.weeks[weekNum - 1] = { title: "", tasks: [], raids: [] };
        }
        UI.currentWeekEdit = weekNum;
        document.getElementById('week-title').innerText = `WEEK ${weekNum} LOGS`;
        
        let html = '';
        
        // الكشف التلقائي عن الخطوات
        let autoStepsHTML = '';
        if (Store.raids) {
            Store.raids.forEach(r => {
                if (r.archived || r.status === 'COMPLETED') return;
                if (r.steps) {
                    r.steps.forEach(step => {
                        let stepW = step.assignedDate ? step.assignedDate.w : step.week;
                        
                        if (stepW == weekNum) {
                            const isDone = step.status === 'DONE';
                            autoStepsHTML += `
                            <div class="game-row" style="padding:10px; border-left:4px solid var(--inject); background:rgba(206, 130, 255, 0.05); opacity:${isDone?0.5:1}; margin-bottom:5px;">
                                <div style="flex:1">
                                    <div style="font-size:0.65rem; color:var(--inject); font-weight:800;"><i class="fas fa-satellite-dish"></i> ${escapeHTML(r.title)}</div>
                                    <div style="font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:bold; color:#fff; ${isDone?'text-decoration:line-through':''}">${escapeHTML(step.txt)}</div>
                                </div>
                            </div>`;
                        }
                    });
                }
            });
        }
        
        if(autoStepsHTML) {
            html += `<div style="margin-bottom:15px; border-bottom:1px dashed #333; padding-bottom:10px;">${autoStepsHTML}</div>`;
        }

        // العناصر المربوطة يدوياً
        const week = Store.season.weeks[weekNum - 1];

        // مهام يدوية
        if(week.tasks && week.tasks.length > 0) {
            html += `<div style="font-size:0.7rem; color:var(--stat-int); margin-bottom:5px; font-weight:800; margin-top:10px;">📋 LINKED TASKS</div>`;
            week.tasks.forEach(tId => {
                const t = Store.tasks.find(x => x.id == tId);
                if(t) html += `<div class="game-row" style="padding:8px; font-size:0.9rem; margin-bottom:5px;">${escapeHTML(t.title)}</div>`;
            });
        }

        // غارات يدوية
        if(week.raids && week.raids.length > 0) {
            html += `<div style="font-size:0.7rem; color:var(--danger); margin-bottom:5px; margin-top:10px; font-weight:800;">⚔️ LINKED RAIDS</div>`;
            week.raids.forEach(rId => {
                const r = Store.raids.find(x => x.id == rId);
                if(r) html += `<div class="game-row" style="padding:8px; font-size:0.9rem; border-color:var(--danger); margin-bottom:5px;">${escapeHTML(r.title)}</div>`;
            });
        }

        // رسالة في حال الفراغ التام
        if(!html) html = `<div style="text-align:center; color:#666; padding:20px;">No protocols assigned.</div>`;

        // زر الإضافة اليدوية
        const assignBtn = `
            <div style="margin-bottom:20px;">
                <button class="btn-3d" style="width:100%; font-size:0.8rem; background:var(--bg-panel); border:1px solid #444;" onclick="UI.showAssignMenu()">
                    <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> ASSIGN MANUAL PROTOCOL
                </button>
            </div>
        `;

        document.getElementById('week-content').innerHTML = assignBtn + html;
        document.getElementById('modal-week').classList.add('active');
    },

    // 6. قائمة الربط (Dropdown) لربط العناصر يدوياً
    showAssignMenu: () => {
        const weekNum = UI.currentWeekEdit;
        if(!weekNum) return;

        const activeTasks = Store.tasks.filter(t => !t.archived && t.status !== 'DONE');
        const activeRaids = Store.raids.filter(r => !r.archived && r.status !== 'COMPLETED');

        if (activeTasks.length === 0 && activeRaids.length === 0) {
            Swal.fire({
                icon: 'info',
                title: 'No Active Protocols',
                text: 'Create new active Tasks or Raids first.',
                background: '#111', color: '#fff', confirmButtonColor: '#333'
            });
            return;
        }

        let options = '<option value="">-- SELECT PROTOCOL --</option>';
        if(activeTasks.length) {
            options += `<optgroup label="TASKS">`;
            activeTasks.forEach(t => options += `<option value="TASK:${t.id}">${escapeHTML(t.title)}</option>`);
            options += `</optgroup>`;
        }
        if(activeRaids.length) {
            options += `<optgroup label="RAIDS">`;
            activeRaids.forEach(r => options += `<option value="RAID:${r.id}">${escapeHTML(r.title)}</option>`);
            options += `</optgroup>`;
        }

        Swal.fire({
            title: `Assign to Week ${weekNum}`,
            html: `<select id="swal-assign-select" class="console-input" style="width:100%; margin-top:10px;">${options}</select>`,
            background: '#111', color: '#fff', showCancelButton: true, confirmButtonText: 'LINK', confirmButtonColor: '#58cc02',
            preConfirm: () => {
                const val = document.getElementById('swal-assign-select').value;
                if(!val) return;
                
                const [type, id] = val.split(':');
                const weekIdx = weekNum - 1;

                if (!Store.season.weeks[weekIdx].tasks) Store.season.weeks[weekIdx].tasks = [];
                if (!Store.season.weeks[weekIdx].raids) Store.season.weeks[weekIdx].raids = [];

                if(type === 'TASK' && !Store.season.weeks[weekIdx].tasks.includes(id)) Store.season.weeks[weekIdx].tasks.push(id);
                if(type === 'RAID' && !Store.season.weeks[weekIdx].raids.includes(id)) Store.season.weeks[weekIdx].raids.push(id);
                
                DataMgr.save();
                UI.openWeekDetails(weekNum);
                const Toast = Swal.mixin({ toast: true, position: 'top-end', showConfirmButton: false, timer: 1500, background: '#111', color: '#fff' });
                Toast.fire({ icon: 'success', title: 'Protocol Linked' });
            }
        });
    },

    // 7. دالة مساعدة لعرض زر الوصول السريع للأسبوع
    renderWeekProtocols: (weekNum) => {
        return `<button class="btn-3d" style="width:100%; background:var(--danger); box-shadow:0 0 15px var(--danger-shadow);" onclick="UI.openWeekDetails(${weekNum})">
                    <i class="fas fa-briefcase"></i> ACCESS WEEK ${weekNum} PROTOCOLS
                </button>`;
    },
       // --- CALENDAR LOGIC ---
    changeMonth: (dir) => {
        UI.calDate.setMonth(UI.calDate.getMonth() + dir);
        UI.renderCalendar();
    },

    renderCalendar: () => {
        const date = UI.calDate;
        const year = date.getFullYear();
        const month = date.getMonth();
        
        // تحديث العنوان
        const monthNames = ["JANUARY", "FEBRUARY", "MARCH", "APRIL", "MAY", "JUNE", "JULY", "AUGUST", "SEPTEMBER", "OCTOBER", "NOVEMBER", "DECEMBER"];
        document.getElementById('cal-month-name').innerText = monthNames[month];
        document.getElementById('cal-year-num').innerText = year;

        const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay();
        const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
        const grid = document.getElementById('calendar-body');
        grid.innerHTML = '';

        // مربعات فارغة لبداية الشهر
        for(let i=0; i<firstDay; i++) {
            grid.innerHTML += `<div></div>`;
        }

        const todayDate = new Date();
        const isCurrentMonth = todayDate.getMonth() === month && todayDate.getFullYear() === year;

        // رسم الأيام
        for(let d=1; d<=daysInMonth; d++) {
            // البحث عن بيانات لهذا اليوم
            // 1. العادات
            let dotsHTML = '';
            // التاريخ بصيغة string للمقارنة (تأكد من توافقها مع صيغة الحفظ عندك)
            // ملاحظة: toDateString() يعطي "Thu Jan 08 2026"
            const checkDate = new Date(year, month, d).toDateString();
            
            Store.habits.forEach(h => {
                if(h.history[checkDate]) {
                    const color = h.history[checkDate] === 'DONE' ? 'dot-habit-done' : 'dot-habit-miss';
                    dotsHTML += `<div class="cal-dot ${color}"></div>`;
                }
            });

            // 2. المهام (إذا عندها تاريخ محدد)
            Store.tasks.forEach(t => {
                // نفترض أنdueDate مخزنة بصيغة YYYY-MM-DD
                const taskDate = t.dueDate ? new Date(t.dueDate).toDateString() : null;
                if(taskDate === checkDate) {
                    dotsHTML += `<div class="cal-dot dot-task"></div>`;
                }
            });

            const isToday = isCurrentMonth && d === todayDate.getDate();
            const hasData = dotsHTML !== '';

            const cell = document.createElement('div');
            cell.className = `cal-cell ${isToday ? 'today' : ''} ${hasData ? 'has-data' : ''}`;
            cell.onclick = () => UI.showDayDetails(checkDate);
            cell.innerHTML = `<div class="cal-num">${d}</div><div class="cal-dots">${dotsHTML}</div>`;
            
            grid.appendChild(cell);
        }
    },

    showDayDetails: (dateStr) => {
        const box = document.getElementById('cal-day-details');
        const content = document.getElementById('cal-day-logs');
        box.classList.remove('hidden');
        content.innerHTML = `<div style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:10px; color:#fff;">${dateStr}</div>`;
        
        let found = false;

        // سجل العادات
        Store.habits.forEach(h => {
            if(h.history[dateStr]) {
                found = true;
                const status = h.history[dateStr];
                const color = status === 'DONE' ? 'var(--accent)' : 'var(--danger)';
                content.innerHTML += `
                    <div class="game-row" style="padding:8px; border-left-color:${color}; margin-bottom:5px;">
                        <span style="font-size:0.8rem;">${escapeHTML(h.title)}</span>
                        <span style="font-weight:bold; color:${color}">${status}</span>
                    </div>`;
            }
        });

        if(!found) content.innerHTML += `<div style="text-align:center; color:var(--text-muted); font-size:0.8rem;">No activity logs found.</div>`;
    },
 

};
